instruction:
For an F-curve with degrees of freedom df=(12,5), find the F-value that has area 0.01 to its right. [ANS] A. 5.06  B. 3.27  C. 9.89  D. None of the above
For an F-curve with degrees of freedom df=(4,10), find the F-value that has area 0.005 to its right. [ANS] A. 7.34  B. 20.97  C. 2.61  D. None of the above
